set.body: Investigate user-facing formula/model-frame paths with amatrix objects: model.matrix(~ X), lm(y ~ X, data=df), and lm.fit(as.matrix(X), y). Use fresh Rscript probes, capture exact output, and file any concrete bug with a runnable minimal repro and observed vs expected behavior. Do not close discovered bugs from the hunt.
set.title: Round 6 bug hunt: formula interface and model.matrix with amatrix objects
